scenario.scene: Premium pilates studio, sage-green reformer machine behind her, tall floor-to-ceiling mirror she is facing. Warm marble floor, exposed brick side wall, a tall window on the left letting in late-afternoon sun.
scenario.outfit: Cream ribbed seamless cropped tank with built-in shelf bra, matching cream high-waist seamless leggings, small gold huggie earrings, a thin gold pendant necklace. Hair down, soft natural waves with a center part. Bare feet (pilates studio convention). Clean neutral nails.
scenario.pose: Standing facing the mirror, weight on her left leg, right knee slightly bent, posture upright with a soft confident smile.

hand_assignment.other_hand_does: holds phone at face level capturing the mirror reflection

scenario.grip_or_placement: Left hand at chest level, thumb pressed flat on the front face of the box, four fingers wrapping the back edge, box held perpendicular to her body so the front face points directly at the mirror. The right hand holds the phone and nothing else.
scenario.lighting: Soft warm natural daylight pouring through a tall window on her left, late afternoon, warm bone tones across the marble floor, gentle warm rim on her left side and a warm glow on the box's front face.
scenario.palette: cream, beige, sage green, warm marble bone
resolves_failure_modes: outfit lock — explicitly cream not white-bra-and-shorts of persona ref
scenario.notes: Highest-priority pilates scenario — the brand's natural visual register. Mirror selfie test: explicit hand assignment, product front-face toward mirror.

step_1_output.step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a cream ribbed seamless cropped tank with built-in shelf bra and matching cream high-waist seamless leggings, small gold huggie earrings, a thin gold pendant necklace, hair down in soft natural waves with a center part, bare feet, clean neutral nails. She stands in a premium pilates studio facing a tall floor-to-ceiling mirror, sage-green reformer machine behind her, warm marble floor, exposed brick side wall, a tall window on her left letting in late-afternoon sun. Standing facing the mirror, weight on her left leg, right knee slightly bent, posture upright with a soft confident smile. Her right hand is raised at face level holding a phone capturing the mirror reflection. Her left hand is at chest level, palm angled slightly toward the mirror, fingers in a relaxed open position, currently empty. Soft warm natural daylight pours through the tall window on her left, late afternoon, warm bone tones across the marble floor, gentle warm rim on her left side. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro front camera. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Post-class composed polished mood, palette of cream, beige, sage green, warm marble bone. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: Left hand at chest level, thumb pressed flat on the front face of the box, four fingers wrapping the back edge, box held perpendicular to her body so the front face points directly at the mirror.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box into her left hand at chest level, oriented so the front face of the box points directly at the mirror — the mirror reflection visible in the frame must show the box's front face clearly readable. The right hand continues to hold the phone unchanged.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — medium full mid-thigh-up framing where face is one of several elements alongside the mirror reflection, phone, and reformer; default sufficient with the verbatim face descriptor and strong identity-lock instruction.

step_2_output.step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and styling, body proportions, cream ribbed cropped tank and matching cream high-waist leggings, gold huggie earrings and pendant necklace, bare feet, and the entire pilates studio scene including the floor-to-ceiling mirror, sage-green reformer machine, warm marble floor, exposed brick wall, and tall window — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her left hand at chest level: her left arm bent at the elbow, wrist relaxed, thumb pressed flat on the front face of the box near the top, four fingers wrapping the back edge, the box held perpendicular to her body so the front face points directly at the mirror — the mirror reflection in the frame must show the box's front face clearly readable. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand. Her body posture and arm angle may shift slightly to make the holding pose look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her right hand continues to hold the phone at face level capturing the mirror reflection, her left hand visibly grips the product. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color, only apply the scene's directional lighting on top. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: soft warm natural daylight pouring through the tall window on her left, late afternoon, with a gentle warm rim on her left side and a soft shadow falling toward her right.
